name: Woodward, Inc.
business: Woodward designs, manufactures, and services control solutions for aerospace and industrial markets, including propulsion, actuation, motion control, and combustion systems, focusing on energy optimization for OEMs and aftermarket support.
sellsTo: Power generation utilities and data centers

exposures.sentence: Our aerospace products and systems are primarily used to provide propulsion, actuation, and motion control in both commercial and defense fixed-wing aircraft, rotorcraft, smart defense, and other defense systems.
The demand for power generation, driven in part by rising data center requirements, remained robust in fiscal year 2025.
Defense OEM sales increased in fiscal year 2025 as compared to fiscal year 2024, primarily driven by increased demand for our smart defense products.
we have developed and are executing on strategies to leverage the macro trends of reducing greenhouse gases, commercializing space, and accelerating the digital age.
We expect this trend to continue as global electrification, renewable integration, and expanding data center loads drive increased electricity consumption.
During fiscal year 2025, we experienced growth driven by increased demand for solutions supporting liquified natural gas production.
Key markets for transportation include compressed natural gas and liquefied natural gas trucks in Asia, mining, and commercial and defense marine markets.
We recently announced that Airbus has selected Woodward as the supplier for the electro-hydraulic A350 Spoiler Actuation System.
In fiscal year 2025, we experienced a material decline in demand for our on highway natural gas truck business in China compared to fiscal year 2024.

Our industrial products are used worldwide in various types of turbine and reciprocating engine-powered equipment, including electric power generation and distribution systems, ships, locomotives, compressors, pumps, and other mobile and industrial machines.

catalysts.event: Boeing strike ends, resuming 737 MAX and 777 production
catalysts.sentence: In November 2024, Boeing's U.S. West Coast factory workers accepted a new contract offer, ending a seven-week strike that halted production of the 737 MAX as well as the 777.

catalysts.event: FAA and Boeing agree to increase 737 build rates
catalysts.sentence: in October 2025, the FAA and Boeing jointly agreed they could increase the 737 build rates.

catalysts.event: Airbus selects Woodward as supplier for A350 spoiler actuation system
catalysts.sentence: We recently announced that Airbus has selected Woodward as the supplier for the electro-hydraulic A350 Spoiler Actuation System.

catalysts.event: Woodward acquires Safran's electromechanical actuation business
catalysts.sentence: In addition, Woodward announced the acquisition of Safran s electromechanical actuation business.
